basicDetails.schemeName: Export Promotion Council Membership Reimbursement Scheme for Scheduled Caste/Scheduled Tribe

nodalMinistryName.label: Ministry Of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises

schemeContent.detailedDescription_md: Launched by the Ministry Of Micro, Small & Medium Enterprises, Export Promotion Council Membership Reimbursement Scheme is a sub scheme under National Scheduled Caste and Scheduled Tribe Hub (NSSH) scheme. Under this scheme, reimbursement will be provided to an Scheduled Caste (SC)/Scheduled Tribe (ST) Micro & small enterprises(MSEs), on annual membership subscription fee/one-time subscription charges/entry fee charged by various Export Promotion Councils (EPC).
schemeContent.benefits_md: **Reimbursement of Membership Fee:** Reimbursement of 80% or up to ₹20,000 (excluding GST and other applicable taxes), whichever is less, per financial year for SC/ST MSEs towards annual membership, one-time subscription, or entry fee charged by Export Promotion Councils (EPCs).
schemeContent.briefDescription: Export Promotion Council Membership Reimbursement Scheme provides  reimbursement to an SC/ST Micro & small enterprises(MSEs), on annual membership subscription fee / one-time subscription charges/entry fee charged by various Export Promotion Councils (EPC).

children.text: Launched by the Ministry Of Micro, Small & Medium Enterprises, Export Promotion Council Membership Reimbursement Scheme is a sub scheme under National Scheduled Caste and Scheduled Tribe Hub (NSSH) scheme. Under this scheme, reimbursement will be provided to an Scheduled Caste (SC)/Scheduled Tribe (ST) Micro & small enterprises(MSEs), on annual membership subscription fee/one-time subscription charges/entry fee charged by various Export Promotion Councils (EPC).

Reimbursement of 80% or up to ₹20,000 (excluding GST and other applicable taxes), whichever is less, per financial year for SC/ST MSEs towards annual membership, one-time subscription, or entry fee charged by Export Promotion Councils (EPCs).
The applicant must visit the official portal of the
The applicant must click on the "Scheme name" and then click on “Sign Up” and register using basic details such as name, email ID, and mobile number.
The applicant must create a password and complete the registration process.
The applicant must log in using the registered credentials.
The applicant must fill in the required details and submit the application online.

applicationProcess.process_md: **Step 1:** The applicant must visit the official portal of the [National SC-ST Hub](https://www.scsthub.in/nssh-schemes/). **Step 2:** The applicant must click on the "Scheme name" and then click on “Sign Up” and register using basic details such as name, email ID, and mobile number. **Step 3:** The applicant must create a password and complete the registration process. **Step 4:** The applicant must log in using the registered credentials. **Step 5:** The applicant must fill in the required details and submit the application online.

eligibilityCriteria.eligibilityDescription_md: - Applicant should belong to Scheduled Caste(SC)/Scheduled Tribe (ST) category. - He/She should represent any Micro and Small Enterprises (MSEs).

children.text: Applicant should belong to Scheduled Caste(SC)/Scheduled Tribe (ST) category.
He/She should represent any Micro and Small Enterprises (MSEs).
